footer_description: Grupo Esperança Trading, Lda is an Angolan food processing company, owner of the brands Toto Drink, Toto Food and Frango Premium, committed to producing natural and organic foods.
footer_address_text: Golf 2. Quintalão do Petro, between Banco Sol and Fábrica de Blocos.
footer_copyright: Copyright © {{year}} Grupo Esperança Trading, Lda. All Rights Reserved.
home_about_body_1: Grupo Esperança Trading, Lda is an Angolan food processing company, committed to industrial development and the promotion of health through nutrition. Owner of the Toto Drink and Toto Food brands, the company produces natural preservative-free juices and traditional African foods, valuing local products and promoting organic consumption in Angola and beyond.
home_about_body_2: From Angolan soil to your table — Every product is born from a commitment to the land, local farmers, and the health of those who choose us. We produce with respect for the natural origin of ingredients, without chemical additives or preservatives.
home_why_text_1: Ingredients harvested directly from Angolan soil, valuing local producers and traditions.
home_why_text_2: Natural production, no chemical additives, preserving genuine flavor and nutritional benefits.
home_why_text_3: Place your order and receive it directly at home, with speed and reliability.
home_why_text_4: Make your purchase directly through our digital platforms, simply and securely.
home_brands_subtitle: Three brands, one commitment: bringing the best of Angolan soil to you
home_brand_toto_desc: Made from carefully selected local fruits, Toto Drink juices bring the genuine taste of Angola directly to your table.
home_brand_tofood_desc: A line focused on typical African dishes and preserves, preserving the authentic flavor and nutritional characteristics of Angolan foods.
home_brand_frango_tagline: Grilled and roasted chicken with traditional sides
home_brand_frango_desc: Grilled or roasted chicken, served with kiquanga, fried banana-bread or potatoes — premium quality with traditional Angolan flavor.
home_products_subtitle: Discover our line of natural products
home_cta_text: From Angolan soil to your table — natural, fresh products made with care.
about_hero_subtitle: From Angolan soil to your table
about_about_body_1: Grupo Esperança Trading, Lda is an Angolan food processing company, committed to industrial development and the promotion of health through nutrition. Owner of the Toto Drink and Toto Food brands, the company produces natural preservative-free juices and traditional African foods, valuing local products and promoting organic consumption in Angola and beyond.
about_about_body_2: — Every product is born from a commitment to the land, local farmers, and the health of those who choose us. We produce with respect for the natural origin of ingredients, without chemical additives or preservatives.
about_mission_text: To promote good health through healthy eating, investing in the organic food industry and the processing of products without chemical additives.
about_vision_text: To transform Angola and Africa into industrial references, capable of combating food insufficiency and reducing extreme poverty, training youth in processing, conservation and certification of local products.
about_value_text_1: We believe in the potential of Angolan youth as a driving force for transformation in the food sector.
about_value_title_2: Creating sustainable local small and medium industries
about_value_text_2: Driving local industrial development with sustainable and replicable business models.
about_value_text_3: Generating employment and technical training to keep young people in their home communities.
about_value_title_4: Contributing to economic and social growth
about_value_text_4: Generating positive impact in Angola and Africa through quality food production.
brands_hero_subtitle: Toto Drink · Toto Food · Frango Premium
brands_toto_desc: Made from carefully selected local fruits, Toto Drink juices bring the genuine taste of Angola directly to your table. No chemical additives, no preservatives — just fruit, freshness and quality in every bottle.
brands_tofood_desc: A line focused on typical African dishes and preserves, preserving the authentic flavor and nutritional characteristics of Angolan foods. Toto Food is the way to keep our country's food tradition alive, with industrial quality and table confidence.
brands_frango_tagline: Grilled and roasted chicken with traditional sides
brands_frango_desc: Grilled or roasted chicken, served with kiquanga, fried banana-bread or potatoes — a gastronomic proposal that combines premium quality with traditional Angolan flavor, ideal for everyday meals or special events.
brands_services_subtitle: From production to delivery, complete food solutions for families, businesses and events
services_service_1_desc: Production of 100% natural juices, made from fresh Angolan fruit, without any preservatives or chemical additives.
services_service_2_desc: Functional juices developed to support hydration, energy and daily well-being, maintaining the brand's 100% natural commitment.
services_service_3_desc: Supply of natural juices for companies, parties, conferences and private events, with quantity and customization options.
services_service_4_desc: Peas, okra, fumbua, kizaca and other traditional vegetables, frozen to preserve freshness, flavor and nutritional value.
services_service_5_desc: Gindungo powder, prepared jindungo and other traditional Angolan delicacies, ready to use in your kitchen.
services_service_6_desc: Sale of grilled and roasted chicken, with traditional sides such as kiquanga, fried banana-bread or potatoes.
gallery_hero_subtitle: See images of our products, events and much more...
store_hero_subtitle: Browse our catalog of natural and fresh products
store_products_subtitle: Natural, fresh products made with care — from Angolan soil to your table
toto_drink_desc_1: Made from carefully selected local fruits, Toto Drink juices bring the genuine taste of Angola directly to your table. No chemical additives, no preservatives — just fruit, freshness and quality in every bottle.
toto_drink_desc_2: Each variety is designed to offer a unique flavor experience, making the most of what Angolan soil has to offer. From sweet mango to tropical passion fruit, refreshing pineapple and aromatic guava, Toto Drink is the natural choice for those who value health and flavor.
toto_drink_products_subtitle: Discover the complete Toto Drink juice line
toto_food_desc_1: A line focused on typical African dishes and preserves, preserving the authentic flavor and nutritional characteristics of Angolan foods. Toto Food is the way to keep our country's food tradition alive, with industrial quality and table confidence.
toto_food_desc_2: From traditional frozen vegetables like peas, okra, fumbua and kizaca, to bottled delicacies like gindungo powder and prepared jindungo — Toto Food brings the taste of Angola to every meal, with the practicality that everyday life demands.
toto_food_products_subtitle: Discover the complete Toto Food product line
frango_hero_subtitle: Grilled and roasted chicken with traditional sides
frango_desc_1: Grilled or roasted chicken, served with kiquanga, fried banana-bread or potatoes — a gastronomic proposal that combines premium quality with traditional Angolan flavor, ideal for everyday meals or special events.
frango_desc_2: Each meal is prepared with selected ingredients and traditional seasonings, ensuring an experience that combines the best of Angolan cuisine with the rigor and quality that the Frango Premium brand represents.
frango_products_subtitle: Discover the complete Frango Premium product line

contact_faq_subtitle: Quick answers to the most common questions
contact_faq_1_answer: No. All Toto Drink juices are 100% natural, produced without any preservatives or chemical additives. Only carefully selected fresh Angolan fruit.
contact_faq_2_question: How can I place an order?
contact_faq_2_answer: You can place your order by contacting us via phone or email available on this page. We deliver directly to your door.
contact_faq_3_question: Do you deliver to events and companies?
contact_faq_3_answer: Yes! We supply natural juices, delicacies and Frango Premium for companies, parties, conferences and private events. We have quantity and customization options according to the size of your event.
contact_visit_subtitle: We are located in the industrial heart of Luanda
